scope.target: Define universal, tech-stack-specific, and repo-specific AI context placement rules.
scope.dependency_radius: Documentation ownership and AI context routing.
constraints: Folder placement is the primary classification mechanism.
Metadata is reserved for machine-readable canonical assets.
non_goals: Do not create a full-stack template in this workflow.

user_constraints: Current specialized context is .NET backend only and excludes .NET frontend frameworks.

steps: Update entry documents to point to the policy.
Document universal, dotnet-backend, and repo-specific placement rules.

results.summary: Added AI context boundary policy and linked it from standards, .dev README, and .ai directory rules.
